subject: VPN connection issue — please help ASAP
description:
URGENT HELP NEEDED

Hi IT Support Team,

I can't connect to the VPN since this morning. I keep getting Error 619: A connection to the remote computer could not be established.

  • Operating System: Windows 11 Pro 23H2
  • VPN Client: GlobalProtect 6.1.2
  • Location: Remote (home office, Chicago)

I've tried:

  1. Restarting my laptop
  2. Uninstalling and reinstalling GlobalProtect
  3. Flushing DNS cache
TimeResult
7:00 AMFailed
7:30 AMFailed
8:15 AMFailed

Please help ASAP, I have client calls starting at 10 AM.

Thanks,
Mark Chen

subject: Laptop won't turn on
description:
🚨🚨🚨 ПОМОГИТЕ! My laptop 💻 won't turn on since yesterday ⚡

I was working on the отчёт (quarterly report) when the screen went 🖥️➡️⬛ black.

Symptoms:
• Power button light 🔴 blinks 3 times then stops
• No 🔊 sounds at all  
• Tried holding power for 30 秒 (seconds) — nothing
• Charger LED is 🟢 green so power supply seems OK

This is my primary work device (Dell Latitude 5540) — I can't do ANYTHING without it 😭

Laptop asset tag: CNT-LP-4521
Docking station: Dell WD19TBS

たすけて！ (Help!)

— Yuki Tanaka 田中

subject: Azure SQL alert — DTU at 99%
description:
Our monitoring system flagged the following alert. Can someone look into this?

Alert payload:
```json
{
  "alertId": "MON-2026-88432",
  "severity": "critical",
  "source": "Azure Monitor",
  "resource": "/subscriptions/a1b2c3d4/resourceGroups/prod-rg/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/contoso-sql-prod/databases/TradingDB",
  "condition": {
    "metric": "dtu_consumption_percent",
    "operator": "GreaterThan",
    "threshold": 95,
    "currentValue": 99.2,
    "windowSize": "PT5M"
  },
  "fired_at": "2026-03-17T14:23:00Z",
  "description": "DTU consumption has exceeded 95% for the past 5 minutes on TradingDB"
}
```

```xml
<Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event">
  <System>

</Event>
```

Trading desk is reporting slowness on the order management system. This could be related.
